response.justification: Bogdan has solid full-stack engineering breadth and roughly 20 years of experience, which meets the tenure threshold. However, the role demands a director-level individual contributor recognized as an AI expert who has demonstrably built AI-powered products or platforms at scale, advised strategic customers, and driven organizational AI strategy. Bogdan's AI exposure is limited to his current role (started April 2025) doing MCP tooling and agentic workflow infrastructure — creditable early work, but far short of the depth, recognition, and strategic scope required. There is no advanced degree in an AI-related field, no history of advising enterprise customers on AI adoption, and no evidence of the thought-leadership or external recognition this role expects at the principal/director level.
strengths: ~20 years of continuous engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — comfortably meets the 15-year floor
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative and ability to ship independently, aligning with the 'startup within a larger org' preference
Hands-on AI agent infrastructure work at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) shows current engagement with the AI tooling space
concerns: No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field; the two bachelor's degrees are in Computer Science and Photography — the preferred academic credential is absent
AI expertise is nascent and unrecognized: no published research, no large-scale AI products, no conference presence in AI — the role requires demonstrated, externally visible AI authority
Career trajectory is Senior/Staff IC, not director-level strategic leadership; no evidence of advising customers, influencing product roadmaps at scale, or shaping organizational AI strategy
